zh.lifeSummary: 當Tadc Mac Briain於大約0984年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾吉拉阿洛時，他的父親Brian Bóruma Mac Cennétig High King of Ireland44歲，母親Echrad ingen Carlus41歲。他和Mór O Mulloy至少有4個兒子。他去世於大約1023年在愛爾蘭蒙斯特享年41歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Tadc Mac Briain于大约0984年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾吉拉阿洛时，他的父亲Brian Bóruma Mac Cennétig High King of Ireland44岁，母亲Echrad ingen Carlus41岁。他和Mór O Mulloy至少有4个儿子。他去世于大约1023年在爱尔兰蒙斯特享年41岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾。

nameMeanings.name: Mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Cuong, Minh, Lien, Muoi, Thanh, Tho, Tieu, Vinh, Anh, Beo, Binh, Chau.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 麥 (see   Mai   2) and 莫 (see   Mo   1).
Vietnamese (Mạc): from Chinese 莫 ‘nothing; nonexistent’; see Mo 1.

variants.name: Mai
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Thanh, Hoa, Son, Dung, Long, Binh, Minh, Thu, Hue, Huong, Thuy.  Chinese Chi, Hong, Ho, Sang, Han, Hang, Jian, Li, Man, Mei, Sen, Wei.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 麥, meaning ‘wheat’ in Chinese: (i) from Mai Qiu (麥丘), the title of a man in the state of Qi (located mainly in present-day Shandong province) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), who, despite being very old, came to celebrate the birthday of the Duke Huan of Qi (ruler of the state of Qi, died 643  BC ). His descendants inherited 麥, the first part of his title, as their surname. (ii) borne by descendants of Mai Tie Zhang (麥鐵杖), a famous general during the Sui dynasty (581–618  AD ). His descendants were scattered around southern China.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 買, meaning ‘buy’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of the king Song Weizi, founder of the state of Song. (ii) borne by descendants of the Duke Dao of Xu (ruler of the state of Xu, 546–523  BC ), possibly inheriting his personal name. (iii) from the first element of the personal name Mai Zhu Chu (買朱鉏), style name of an official who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iv) it has also been traced back to other ethnic groups in northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Briain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Brittain  .

variants.name: Brittain
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Anglo-Norman French Bretagne, Bretaign(e) ‘Brittany’. Some of the modern forms are from the Middle English Brytane, Brittan ‘Breton’; compare Breton .

nameMeanings.name: Tadc
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Normally an Anglicized form of Gaelic Tadhg , but sometimes a short form of   Thaddeus .  It is also used as an independent given name, especially in America.

en.lifeSummary: When Tadc Mac Briain was born about 0984, in Killaloe, County Clare, Ireland, his father, Brian Bóruma Mac Cennétig High King of Ireland, was 44 and his mother, Echrad ingen Carlus, was 41. He had at least 4 sons with Mór O Mulloy. He died about 1023, in Munster, Ireland, at the age of 41, and was buried in County Clare, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Tadc Mac Briain est né environ 0984, à Killaloe, County Clare, Irlande, son père, Brian Bóruma Mac Cennétig High King of Ireland, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Echrad ingen Carlus, avait 41 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Mór O Mulloy. Il est décédé environ 1023, à Munster, Irlande, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à County Clare, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Tadc Mac Briain um 0984 in Killaloe, County Clare, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Brian Bóruma Mac Cennétig High King of Ireland 44 und seine Mutter Echrad ingen Carlus 41. Er hatte mit Mór O Mulloy mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb um 1023 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Munster, Irland und wurde in County Clare, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Tadc Mac Briain è nato il circa 0984 nel Killaloe, County Clare, Irlanda, il suo padre, Brian Bóruma Mac Cennétig High King of Ireland, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Echrad ingen Carlus, aveva 41 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Mór O Mulloy. Morì circa 1023, nel Munster, Irlanda, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a County Clare, Irlanda.

ja.Clare, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ クラー
ja.Dublin, Ireland: アイルランドダブリン

ja.Dublin, County Dublin, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ ダブリンダブリン
ja.Munster, Ireland: アイルランドムンスター
ja.Killaloe, County Clare, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ クラーキラロ
ja.lifeSummary: Tadc Mac Briainが約0984年にアイルランドコウントイ クラーキラロで生まれた時，父Brian Bóruma Mac Cennétig High King of Irelandは44歳，母Echrad ingen Carlusは41歳であった。彼はMór O Mulloyとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1023年にアイルランドムンスターで41歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ クラーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Tadc Mac Briain(이)가 대략 0984년 아일랜드 카운티 클래르 킬라로이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Brian Bóruma Mac Cennétig High King of Ireland(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Echrad ingen Carlus(은)는 41세였다. 그는 Mór O Mulloy(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1023년 아일랜드 먼스터에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 클래르에 묻혔다.

mg.about 0984–about 1023: tany ho any amin'ny 0984–tany ho any amin'ny 1023

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Tadc Mac Briain nasceu aproximadamente 0984, em Killaloe, County Clare, Irlanda, seu pai, Brian Bóruma Mac Cennétig High King of Ireland, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Echrad ingen Carlus, tinha 41 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Mór O Mulloy. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1023, em Munster, Irlanda, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em County Clare, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Tadc Mac Briain родился около 0984 г. в местности киллало, коунти клар, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Brian Bóruma Mac Cennétig High King of Ireland было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Echrad ingen Carlus, 41. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Mór O Mulloy. Он умер около 1023 г. в местности мунстир, Ирландия в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности коунти клар, Ирландия.

sm.about 0984–about 1023: e tusa o le 0984–e tusa o le 1023

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Tadc Mac Briain nació aproximadamente 0984, en Killaloe, County Clare, Irlanda, su papá, Brian Bóruma Mac Cennétig High King of Ireland, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Echrad ingen Carlus, tenía 41 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Mór O Mulloy. Murió aproximadamente 1023, en Munster, Irlanda, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en County Clare, Irlanda.
